feed.title: Humaira Ambreen
feed.subtitle: Portfolio updates, projects, support information, and resume updates.

entry.title: Luveian — Full-Stack Internship Project
entry.summary: Production web platform work: full-stack development, UX/UI design, and performance optimization.
entry.content: Production web platform work: full-stack development, UX/UI design, and performance optimization.

entry.title: Lost & Found — Campus PWA
entry.summary: Progressive web app for campus lost & found workflows with real-time sync and offline support.
entry.content: Progressive web app for campus lost & found workflows with real-time sync and offline support.

entry.title: KEC — College Resource Portal
entry.summary: Lightweight college resource hub with accessibility-first design and in-browser ID card generation.
entry.content: Lightweight college resource hub with accessibility-first design and in-browser ID card generation.
